summary: Completed testing of cierre flow improvements and UI tab renaming. All 6 requested features verified working correctly.

issues: Minor: React hydration warning about p > div nesting in Badge component (cosmetic, doesn't affect functionality)

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/registros/{id}/preview-cierre returns costo_servicios=4434.5 from prod_movimientos_produccion (not prod_registro_costos_servicio)
Backend: GET /api/registros/{id}/preview-cierre returns movimientos_detalle array with service breakdown (Corte: 269.5, Costura: 4165.0)
Backend: GET /api/registros/{id}/preview-cierre returns otros_costos=0.0 from prod_registro_costos_servicio
Backend: GET /api/reportes/wip shows consistent costo_servicio=4434.5 matching preview-cierre
Backend: GET /api/reportes/wip shows consistent costo_mp=7840.0 matching preview-cierre
Frontend: 'Gestión OP' tab appears in registro detail dialog (renamed from 'Materia Prima')
Frontend: 'Otros Costos' tab appears inside RegistroDetalleFase2 (renamed from 'Costos')
Frontend: Cierre tab shows 'Servicios de Producción (Movimientos)' table with Corte (490, S/ 269.50) and Costura (490, S/ 4165.00)
Frontend: Cierre tab shows 5-column summary: Costo MP (S/ 7840.00), Costo Servicios (S/ 4434.50), Otros Costos (S/ 0.00), Costo Total (S/ 12274.50), Costo Unit PT (S/ 25.0500)
critical_code_review_comments: Backend cierre.py correctly uses prod_movimientos_produccion for costo_servicios (lines 80-83, 187-190)
Backend cierre.py correctly uses prod_registro_costos_servicio for otros_costos (lines 85-89, 194-197)
Backend cierre.py returns movimientos_detalle array with grouped service costs (lines 119-129)
Frontend Registros.jsx line 555-558: Tab renamed to 'Gestión OP' with Cog icon
Frontend RegistroDetalleFase2.jsx line 1851-1854: Tab renamed to 'Otros Costos'
Frontend RegistroDetalleFase2.jsx line 1635-1661: 'Servicios de Producción (Movimientos)' table renders correctly
Frontend RegistroDetalleFase2.jsx line 1666-1688: 5-column summary shows MP, Servicios, Otros Costos, Total, Unit PT
seed_data_creation: Used existing registro c74d3460-3e8b-4d4c-88e5-06bff012d6f5 (Corte #01) with existing movimientos data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Cierre flow now uses prod_movimientos_produccion for service costs (costo_servicios). prod_registro_costos_servicio is used for otros_costos (additional non-production costs). Tab renames: 'Materia Prima' → 'Gestión OP' in Registros.jsx, 'Costos' → 'Otros Costos' in RegistroDetalleFase2.jsx. The cierre preview shows movimientos_detalle with service breakdown.
